mapper.select: SELECT BANNER_ID AS "bannerId", BANNER_NM_EN AS "bannerNameEn", PLACEMENT_KO AS "placementKo", PLACEMENT_EN AS "placementEn", STATUS_CODE AS "statusCode", CASE WHEN START_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(START_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "startAt", CASE WHEN END_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(END_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "endAt", CLICK_COUNT AS "clickCount", NOTE_EN AS "noteEn", LAST_UPDUSR_ID AS "updatedBy", CASE WHEN LAST_UPDT_PNTTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "updatedAt" FROM COMTNBANNERMETA

SELECT BANNER_ID AS "bannerId", BANNER_NM_EN AS "bannerNameEn", PLACEMENT_KO AS "placementKo", PLACEMENT_EN AS "placementEn", STATUS_CODE AS "statusCode", CASE WHEN START_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(START_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "startAt", CASE WHEN END_AT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(END_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "endAt", CLICK_COUNT AS "clickCount", NOTE_EN AS "noteEn", LAST_UPDUSR_ID AS "updatedBy", CASE WHEN LAST_UPDT_PNTTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "updatedAt" FROM COMTNBANNERMETA WHERE BANNER_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNBANNERMETA ( BANNER_ID, BANNER_NM_EN, PLACEMENT_KO, PLACEMENT_EN, STATUS_CODE, START_AT, END_AT, CLICK_COUNT, NOTE_EN, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{bannerId}, #{bannerNameEn}, #{placementKo}, #{placementEn}, #{statusCode}, CASE WHEN #{startAt} IS NULL OR #{startAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{startAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, CASE WHEN #{endAt} IS NULL OR #{endAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{endAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, #{clickCount}, #{noteEn}, #{updatedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{updatedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNBANNERMETA SET BANNER_NM_EN = #{bannerNameEn}, PLACEMENT_KO = #{placementKo}, PLACEMENT_EN = #{placementEn}, STATUS_CODE = #{statusCode}, START_AT = CASE WHEN #{startAt} IS NULL OR #{startAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{startAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, END_AT = CASE WHEN #{endAt} IS NULL OR #{endAt} = '' THEN NULL ELSE TO_DATETIME(#{endAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, CLICK_COUNT = #{clickCount}, NOTE_EN = #{noteEn}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{updatedBy}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
